---
title: enforce-map-style
description: "Enforce consistent empty-map construction."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Enforce consistent empty-map construction. Strider default: any style.

## Bad

```go
values := make(map[string]int) // with literal style configured
```

## Good

```go
values := map[string]int{} // with literal style configured
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only enforce-map-style`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
